strengths: Strong SQL and complex query experience
Dashboard and reporting delivery (Power BI, Tableau)
weaknesses: No direct sports betting domain experience
No mention of Sigma/Looker or DBT cloud ownership
improvement_bullets: Optimized relational database performance using window functions and CTEs, while implementing data modeling best practices similar to dbt to build reliable source-of-truth tables.
Managed Git workflows including branching strategies and pull request reviews to ensure code quality and seamless team deployment for analytics projects.
Performed customer behavior analysis by building time series models and segmenting high-value users, directly informing marketing and acquisition strategies.
Leveraged SQL and Python to build automated data pipelines and scalable metrics, demonstrating an architectural mindset for analytics engineering.
Integrated AI tools like ChatGPT and Claude into the development lifecycle to accelerate SQL query generation, documentation, and data cleaning tasks.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Analytics Engineer III - FES - Data opportunity with Fanatics. I am interested in this opportunity because of Fanatics’ unique position as a global leader in the sports ecosystem, transforming how fans interact with the sports they love through integrated commerce, collectibles, and betting. What interests me about working for Fanatics is its commitment to data-driven fan experiences, which excites me because of the scale and complexity of the 100-million-fan database your team manages. I believe my advanced SQL proficiency and my hands-on experience in data modeling would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating messy, raw data into clean, actionable business intelligence. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified a need for better KPI visibility and built automated Power BI dashboards that reduced manual reporting time by 40%. The result was an accelerated executive decision-making process that allowed the leadership team to focus on high-impact customer acquisition strategies. Ultimately, I know that the Analytics Engineer III - FES - Data role at Fanatics would allow me to bring my expertise in metric definition to build the reliable source-of-truth tables your team requires. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my robust version control and pipeline architecture skills. By integrating data from disparate APIs and PostgreSQL databases into unified schemas, I streamlined development workflows and improved data accuracy by 30%. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in data modeling and query optimization in working on the Snowflake Intelligence AI initiative at Fanatics. I know that my technical rigor and ability to partner with stakeholders align with what it takes to succeed in this role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
